aids.title: Banker's Matrices
aids.content:
Need = Max - Allocation

Available: What's free
Max: Maximum ever needed
Allocation: Currently held
Need: Still needs

aids.title: Safety Check Steps
aids.content:
1. Work = Available
2. Find P where Need ≤ Work
3. Work += Allocation[P]
4. Mark P finished
5. Repeat until all done or stuck
